h1: LG 65" QNED evo AI QNED93 (2025) — 4K 144Hz VRR, alpha 8 AI Processor Gen2, MiniLED Precision Dimming Pro, Dolby Vision + Dolby Atmos, AI Magic Remote, webOS25 (65QNED93A6A)

gallery.a: Front view of LG 65" QNED evo AI QNED93 4K Smart TV

modules.head: Dynamic QNED Color Pro — Certified 100% Color Volume
modules.body: LG's wide-color-gamut technology delivers lifelike, vivid colour across the entire picture — certified 100% Color Volume to DCI-P3 by Intertek, for reference-grade accuracy on every scene.

modules.head: Ultra-sharp contrast, lifelike detail
modules.body: MiniLED backlight with Precision Dimming Pro, powered by the alpha 8 AI Processor Gen2, produces deep blacks and bright highlights for cinema-grade contrast — every scene, every time.

modules.head: Smarter, faster — a decade of AI innovation
modules.body: Approximately 1.7× greater NPU neural processing and 1.4× faster CPU than the previous generation. Genre-aware AI analyses each frame to optimise picture and sound settings automatically.

modules.head: Every frame brought to life
modules.body: AI Super Upscaling 4K and Dynamic Tone Mapping Pro analyse each frame's skin tones, text and background to enhance resolution, refine detail and preserve creative intent — without over-processing.

modules.head: AI Concierge, AI Voice ID, AI Search — at your fingertips
modules.body: The new AI Magic Remote MR25 pairs with webOS25 to deliver one-press AI Concierge, personalised recommendations via AI Voice ID, and effortless AI Search — voice, motion, and dedicated AI button.
modules.disc: *AI Magic Remote's design, availability and functions may vary by region.

modules.head: PS5, Xbox Series X & PC — ultra-smooth
modules.body: 4 × HDMI 2.1 with 4K 120Hz, VRR up to 144Hz, ALLM and AMD FreeSync — plus QMS for judder-free film playback. Dedicated Gaming Portal consolidates all your consoles and cloud-gaming services in one place.

modules.head: Virtual 9.1.2 up-mix with Dolby Atmos
modules.body: 2.2-channel 40W audio up-mixed to a virtual 9.1.2-channel soundstage with Dolby Atmos — three-dimensional sound from a remarkably slim 58.5 mm chassis. AI Clear Sound enhances dialogue automatically.

modules.head: Cinema as the director intended
modules.body: Dolby Vision delivers scene-by-scene HDR metadata for the most accurate picture, while FILMMAKER MODE disables motion smoothing and preserves the original frame rate, aspect ratio and colour.

modules.head: All picture, barely any frame
modules.body: At just 58.5 mm thin, the QNED93 sits almost flush to the wall — clean minimalist lines that disappear into your space when the TV is off, thanks to LG Gallery+ ambient modes.

specs.v: 120 Hz Native, VRR up to 144 Hz
VRR (≤144 Hz), ALLM, AMD FreeSync, QMS, Gaming Portal

specs.k: Dimensions without Stand (W × H × D, mm)
Dimensions with Stand (W × H × D, mm)
